hooks.command: echo 'Hivespace skill — follow it this session. The team drive map and memory are already loaded below (skip the load step); apply the team conventions and contribute durable learnings back before you finish.'; echo; cat "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/SKILL.md" 2>/dev/null; echo; echo '--- Team drive map (TEAM.md) ---'; hivespace fs cat TEAM.md 2>/dev/null || true; echo; echo '--- Live team memory (memory/MEMORY.md) ---'; hivespace fs cat memory/MEMORY.md 2>/dev/null || true; echo; echo '--- Live coding memory (memory/coding/CODING.md) ---'; hivespace fs cat memory/coding/CODING.md 2>/dev/null || true
